# mesa-meson-local-build

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Target | mesa |
| Type | source-build |
| Status | planned |

## Public Notes

First Mesa reproduction recipe for turning the public source repository and official build documentation into a repeatable local-build track.

## Environment

- clean checkout of https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/mesa/mesa.git at the recorded mesa-main-head commit
- Linux, BSD, macOS, Haiku, Windows, or another platform supported by Mesa's Meson build documentation
- Meson and Ninja installed
- C or C++ compiler supported by the selected Mesa platform
- Python 3.10 or newer
- Python Mako module and packaging module where required
- Flex and Bison or platform equivalents for IR and GLSL compiler generation
- driver-specific development dependencies selected from Mesa's configure output

## Steps

- clone or update the public Mesa source repository listed in the artifact record
- verify the local checkout commit against the mesa-main-head snapshot record
- install platform package dependencies using Mesa's documented package-manager guidance, such as apt-get build-dep mesa or dnf builddep mesa
- configure an out-of-tree build with meson setup builddir/
- inspect and record configuration with meson configure builddir/
- compile with meson compile -C builddir/
- for a temporary local install, configure a prefix with meson setup builddir/ -Dprefix="$MESA_INSTALLDIR" and install with meson install -C builddir/
- run a simple tool through meson devenv -C builddir to verify the local build path before testing larger applications
- record build logs, selected drivers, produced libraries, ICD files, environment variables, and dependency gaps as public-safe metadata

## Expected Outputs

- source snapshot manifest
- Meson configuration transcript
- compiler transcript
- selected driver and platform option list
- local install manifest
- library or driver output inventory
- runtime environment notes for OpenGL, Vulkan, or OpenCL tests
- dependency gap list

## Artifacts

- mesa-source-repository
- mesa-license-and-api-summary

## Evidence Sources

| Source | Type | Confidence | Scope | URL |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Mesa source code repository documentation | repository-documentation | high | Mesa upstream repository location and anonymous Git access | https://docs.mesa3d.org/repository.html |
| Mesa compiling and installing documentation | build-documentation | high | Mesa build prerequisites, Meson/Ninja setup commands, install flow, and local-run instructions | https://docs.mesa3d.org/install.html |
| Mesa license and copyright documentation | license-documentation | high | Mesa license posture for core library and component-level licenses | https://docs.mesa3d.org/license.html |
